---
title: "UTKa DataLab"
subtitle: "Advancing Federated Data Research"
---

UTKa DataLab is a joint research initiative between [Kadaster](https://www.kadaster.nl) and the [University of Twente](https://www.utwente.nl), based in Apeldoorn. We develop methods to extract, combine, and analyze information from distributed data sources, with a strong commitment to ethical conduct, scientific integrity, and open science.

## Research Themes

- [AI with Authoritative Data](research/ai-authoritative-data.qmd) — grounding LLMs and AI systems in authoritative knowledge graphs
- [Trusted Federative Data Infrastructures](research/federated-infrastructure.qmd) — secure, privacy-respecting architectures for cross-system data sharing

## Active Projects

| Project | Type |
|---|---|
| [Security and Privacy-Aware Virtual Knowledge Graphs](projects/security-privacy-vkg.qmd) | PhD |
| [Virtual Knowledge Graphs for Legacy Systems](projects/vkg-legacy-systems.qmd) | EngD |
| [LLM Enhancement via Knowledge Graphs](projects/llm-knowledge-graphs.qmd) | PhD |
| [LLM and Knowledge Graph Chatbot](projects/llm-kg-chatbot.qmd) | EngD |
| [AI Information Extraction from Notarial Deeds](projects/ai-notarial-deeds.qmd) | EngD |
